description: Implement git worktree discovery: Create pkg/worktree package that lists worktrees for a given project path. Use 'git worktree list --porcelain' to get worktree data. Parse output into Worktree struct with fields: Path, Branch, Commit, IsPrimary. Create function ListWorktrees(projectPath string) ([]Worktree, error) that returns all worktrees for the project.
acceptance_criteria: ListWorktrees function parses 'git worktree list --porcelain' output
Function returns slice of Worktree structs with all fields populated
